title: Zero Trace AI – private AI chat with nothing to subpoena
abstract: Zero Trace AI offers a private chat experience where your conversations leave no trace, making it seem as if you're talking to thin air. Perfect for those who fear privacy invasions—FBI or otherwise—this tool ensures your chats are completely untraceable. With its user-friendly interface, simply say "Hi, Zero" and you're in a no-trace mode. Join the fray and keep your secrets safely hidden in plain sight!
abstract_zh: Zero Trace AI，就是你的私密小天地，聊天记录不留任何蛛丝马迹，就像你和空气对话一样自然。再也不用担心隐私泄露，连 FBI 都找不到你的聊天痕迹！而且操作简单到让人怀疑人生，只需一句“嗨，Zero”，就能开启无痕模式。来吧，让我们一起把秘密藏在空气中，享受那份自在与安心！
